title: Rich Crispy French Rice Bouillabaisse
description: A satvik-friendly, crispy rice soup that blends French bouillabaisse depth with a sesame-infused sauce for a satisfying meal prep option.
instructions: Heat a copper pot over medium heat and add 1 tsp coconut oil until shimmering.
Add the cooked rice to the pot and stir until the grains start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the diced carrots, celery, and mushrooms, cooking until the vegetables soften, about 6 minutes.
Stir in the chickpeas and pour in the vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Let the soup simmer for 10 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the broth to reduce slightly.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sesame oil, soy sauce, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Pour the sesame sauce over the soup, stirring to coat all the ingredients evenly.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds and chopped parsley over the top, then cover the pot to allow the seeds to toast.
Remove the pot from heat, let it sit for 2 minutes, then stir to release the crispy layer at the bottom.
Serve hot, spooning the crispy rice layer into bowls first, followed by the steamy soup.
